must_detect.matched_text: Subject: Preliminary Cybersecurity Incident Report — Non-public; SET disclosure pending; PDPA impact assessment in progress

Per SET Regulation on Disclosure of Information of Listed Companies and SEC Thailand guidance, this constitutes potential inside information; no disclosure has yet been made via SETLink, and the information remains non-public as of the time of this note.

We have informed our audit committee chair, Ms. Lalita Chanchai, and initiated internal PDPA breach assessment procedures; if notification thresholds are met, we will notify affected data subjects and the regulator within the statutory timeframe.
